cover: System architecture diagram: 'Data 360 Federated Grounding: RAG Without Moving Your Data'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Salesforce Data 360 Federated Grounding'. Subtitle 'Vector search + Retriever API + Agentforce 2.0 with zero-copy enterprise data'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Source Systems' (pastel blue): modules 'Snowflake Contracts', 'BigQuery Usage Events', 'SharePoint PDFs'. LAYER 2 'Data 360' (pastel teal): modules 'Zero Copy Federation', 'Unified Catalog', 'Native Vector Search'. LAYER 3 'Agentforce 2.0' (pastel purple): modules 'Atlas Reasoning Engine v2', 'Custom Action', 'Cited Answer'. Central node 'Federated Grounding' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): 'Retriever API v64.0' and '@salesforce/mcp'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Governance': sub-modules 'User Permissions', 'Row Policies', 'Citation Audit' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Bad RAG vs Federated Grounding'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Bad RAG vs Federated Grounding'. Subtitle 'Do not copy regulated enterprise data into unmanaged prompts'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Authorization Drift with lock icon', 'Stale Vector Chunks with clock icon', 'No Citation Trail with document icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'COPY-FIRST RAG' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'DATA 360 FEDERATED RAG' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: const context = allContractText; await openai.responses.create({ model: 'gpt-5.5', input: context + question }); right column green border '// GOOD' code: const hits = await retrieveFromData360({ query, userId, topK: 8 }); await answerWithCitations(hits); BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Enforce source permissions', 'Return cited chunks only', 'Audit retrieval event'. Footer bar: 'RAG should retrieve governed context, not duplicate the enterprise'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Grounded Agentforce Prompt Contract'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Grounded Agentforce Prompt Contract'. Subtitle 'The agent must answer from retrieved Data 360 context only'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Context Gate with shield icon', 'Citation Required with link icon', 'Conflict Escalation with warning icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'LOOSE PROMPT' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'STRICT GROUNDED PROMPT' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: const prompt = `Answer confidently: ${question}`; right column green border '// GOOD' code: const prompt = `Use only groundedContext. If missing, refuse. Cite CITATION_ID for each claim.`; BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'No unsupported claims', 'Citations per fact', 'Human review on conflict'. Footer bar: 'Prompting is policy enforcement, not decoration'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
